channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sen. Banks to Newsmax: 'Dirtbag' Platner Would Have Lost Anyway
item.description: Sen. Jim Banks, R-Ind., told Newsmax on Thursday that Maine Democrat Graham Platner would have been defeated by a wide margin against Republican Sen. Susan Collins.

item.title: New Platner Move Raises Questions About Withdrawal As Potential Replacement Flunks Basic Interview
Trump Lauds Palm Beach Airport Renamed for Him
item.description: President Donald Trump on Thursday praised the newly renamed President Donald J. Trump International Airport in Palm Beach, Florida, predicting it will bring significant attention to the area.

item.title: You Get What You Pay For: London Descends Into Chaos After Morocco Loss in World Cup
